description: Material Passport for Stage 5 — Manuscript Draft (Paper Track). Tracks all artifacts produced during academic manuscript writing, from title through references.

required_artifacts.name: 论文手稿
required_artifacts.description: Complete manuscript draft with all sections: title, abstract, introduction, methods, results, discussion, conclusions, references.

required_artifacts.name: 结构化摘要
required_artifacts.description: Structured abstract (Background, Methods, Results, Conclusions) conforming to target journal requirements.

required_artifacts.name: 引言草稿
required_artifacts.description: Introduction section with literature context, knowledge gap, and study objectives.

required_artifacts.name: 方法草稿
required_artifacts.description: Methods section describing study design, participants, interventions, outcomes, and statistical methods.

required_artifacts.name: 结果草稿
required_artifacts.description: Results section with narrative description of findings referencing tables and figures.

required_artifacts.name: 讨论草稿
required_artifacts.description: Discussion section with interpretation, comparison to literature, limitations, and implications.

required_artifacts.name: 参考文献
required_artifacts.description: Formatted reference list in the target journal style.

required_artifacts.name: 目标期刊
required_artifacts.description: Target journal selection with scope fit analysis and formatting requirements.

optional_artifacts.name: 投稿信
optional_artifacts.description: Cover letter to the editor highlighting novelty and significance.

optional_artifacts.name: 利益冲突声明
optional_artifacts.description: ICMJE conflict of interest disclosure forms.

optional_artifacts.name: 数据可及性声明
optional_artifacts.description: Data availability statement per journal requirements.

optional_artifacts.name: PRISMA清单
optional_artifacts.description: Completed PRISMA checklist if the manuscript is a systematic review.

quality_gates.name: 期刊格式合规
quality_gates.description: Manuscript formatting meets target journal requirements (word count, structure, reference style).

quality_gates.name: 报告指南合规
quality_gates.description: All applicable reporting guideline checklist items are addressed.

quality_gates.name: 文献引用完整性
quality_gates.description: All factual claims are supported by appropriate citations; no uncited assertions.

quality_gates.name: 统计结果一致性
quality_gates.description: Results reported in the manuscript match the analysis execution outputs exactly.

handoff_to_next_stage.description: Final manuscript is submitted externally. No downstream MSRA stage.
